description_long: This house is a modern, boxy residential structure set within a dense grove of stylized coniferous and deciduous trees, with a mix of green and snow-covered foliage. The main building features flat roofs, large windows, and a beige exterior accented by white and gray elements. There is a secondary, smaller building nearby, likely a garage or guest house, with a similar flat-roofed design and gray facade. The landscaping includes purple and green shrubs, and paved walkways connect the buildings. The property is surrounded by a mix of tall, slender trees and bushier, snow-dusted evergreens, creating a secluded, park-like atmosphere. The overall setting suggests a contemporary suburban or semi-urban home with a focus on privacy and integration with nature.
description: A modern, flat-roofed beige house with large windows, surrounded by dense green and snow-covered trees, and accompanied by a smaller gray outbuilding. The property features landscaped shrubs and paved walkways, creating a secluded, contemporary residential setting.
description_view_0: The main house and its flat roof are clearly visible, surrounded by a dense arrangement of green and snow-covered trees, with the smaller gray outbuilding to the right.
description_view_1: The view is dominated by the trees, partially obscuring the house; the gray outbuilding is more prominent in the foreground.
description_view_2: The house is mostly hidden behind the trees, with only the beige facade and some windows peeking through; the gray outbuilding is visible to the left.
description_view_3: The front of the house is visible, showing the main entryway, landscaping, and a clear view of the flat roof and windows, with the gray outbuilding in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with a small overhang, flanked by landscaping and accessed via a paved walkway; minimalistic and modern in style.
